caption:
Cora the Coral has officially begun her journey 🌊

Cora was made for the ocean—drawn to warm waters, coastal escapes, and anywhere the tide sets the rhythm of the day. She’s small enough to travel with you, but curious enough to see the world.

And now… she’s out there.

Cora and her Latitude Buddies travel with us and are left behind in beautiful places for others to discover. If she finds her way to you, you’re part of the journey.

Take her somewhere you love. A place that made you pause. A view you didn’t want to leave.

📸 Snap a photo of where she goes
✍️ Tell us where she is and why you loved it
🏷 Tag @latitudebuddies
#️⃣ Use #CoraTheCoral

We’ll be sharing her travels as she moves from one adventure to the next.

Because Cora isn’t meant to stay in one place— she’s meant to see the world, one traveler at a time.

🌍 Where will she go first?

#LatitudeBuddies #CoraTheCoral #TravelYourWay #WanderWithUs #BeachTravel #TravelWithKids
